assertions.query: SELECT * FROM test WHERE id IN (2, 3, 4, 5);
SELECT * FROM test WHERE id IN (4, 3, 2, 1, 0);
SELECT * FROM test2 WHERE test_id IN (SELECT * FROM test WHERE id = 2);
SELECT * FROM test2 WHERE test_id IN(SELECT * FROM test WHERE id > 0);
SELECT * FROM test WHERE id NOT IN (2, 3, 4, 5);
SELECT * FROM test2 WHERE test_id NOT IN (SELECT * FROM test WHERE id = 2);
SELECT * FROM test2 WHERE test_id NOT IN (SELECT * FROM test WHERE id > 0);
SELECT null IS DISTINCT FROM null;

assertions.scriptName: ANY and ALL array comparison semantics
assertions.query: SELECT 1 = ANY(ARRAY[]::int[]), 1 = ANY(ARRAY[NULL, 1]::int[]), 2 = ANY(ARRAY[NULL, 1]::int[]) IS NULL;

assertions.scriptName: ANY and ALL array comparison semantics
assertions.query: SELECT false = ALL(ARRAY[false, false]), false = ALL(ARRAY[false, true]), false = ALL(ARRAY[]::bool[]), false = ALL(ARRAY[false, NULL]::bool[]) IS NULL;

assertions.scriptName: ANY and ALL array comparison semantics
assertions.query:
WITH indexed(generated) AS (VALUES (ARRAY[false, false]::bool[]))
SELECT false = ALL(indexed.generated) FROM indexed;
